name: Double Chocolate Fantasy Bar
recipeIngredient: 12 oz packag M&M's Semi-sweet Chocolate Baking Bits
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 350°F (325°F for glass pan).
In a bowl, combine butter and cookie crumbs; press mixture into the bottom of a 13 x 9 inch baking pan.
Pour sweetened condensed milk evenly over the crumbs.
Combine the M&M's Semi-Sweet Chocolate Baking Bits, coconut and nuts.
Sprinkle mixture evenly over condensed milk; press in lightly.
Bake for 25 - 30 minutes or until set.
Cool completely before cutting.
Store in a tightly covered container.
